inputs.label: Number of Spins
inputs.businessContext: Total number of roulette wheel spins to analyze.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of roulette wheel spins to analyze.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Analiz edilecek toplam rulet çarkı dönüş sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de tours de roue de roulette à analyser.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de giros de la ruleta a analizar.

inputs.label: Numbers Covered per Spin
inputs.businessContext: Quantity of numbers wagered on in each spin (e.g., 1 for straight-up).

businessContext_i18n.en: Quantity of numbers wagered on in each spin (e.g., 1 for straight-up).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her dönüşte bahis oynanan sayı miktarı (örneğin, tek sayı için 1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zahlen, auf die bei jeder Drehung gesetzt wird (z. B. 1 für Plein).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité de numéros misés à chaque tour (ex. : 1 pour un plein).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de números apostados en cada giro (ej., 1 para pleno).

inputs.label: Payout Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Payout ratio for a winning spin (e.g., 35 for straight-up bet in European roulette).

businessContext_i18n.en: Payout ratio for a winning spin (e.g., 35 for straight-up bet in European roulette).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazanan bir dönüş için ödeme oranı (örneğin, Avrupa ruletinde tek sayı bahsi için 35).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewinnverhältnis für eine gewinnende Drehung (z. B. 35 für Plein-Wette beim europäischen Roulette).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ratio de gain pour un tour gagnant (ex. : 35 pour un plein à la roulette européenne).
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de pago por giro ganador (ej., 35 para apuesta plena en ruleta europea).

inputs.label: Bet Amount per Spin
inputs.businessContext: Wager placed on each individual spin.

label_i18n.fr: Montant de la mise par tour

businessContext_i18n.en: Wager placed on each individual spin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wette, die auf jede einzelne Drehung platziert wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mise placée sur chaque tour individuel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Apuesta colocada en cada giro individual.

inputs.label: Total Numbers on Wheel
inputs.businessContext: Total pockets (37 for European single-zero, 38 for American double-zero).

label_i18n.fr: Nombre total de numéros sur la roue

businessContext_i18n.en: Total pockets (37 for European single-zero, 38 for American double-zero).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam cep sayısı (Avrupa tek sıfır için 37, Amerikan çift sıfır için 38).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Taschen (37 für europäisches Single-Zero, 38 für amerikanisches Double-Zero).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des cases (37 pour le zéro simple européen, 38 pour le double zéro américain).
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de casillas (37 para europea de un solo cero, 38 para americana de doble cero).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
